name: lumi-skill-legal-casework
description: Legal casework pack for intake, deadline planning, document outlines, local case-folder workflows, and lawyer-facing case analysis support.

lumi.setupNote: Designed for lawyer-assisted workflows. Lumi can organize local case folders and guide authorized legal-site research, but captcha/2FA/paywalls are completed by the user and final legal work must be reviewed by a qualified professional.
